tasks.title: Helm chart skeleton: Chart.yaml, single values contract, helpers, README

scenarios: A helm install brings up the full service set
The Helm chart is a first-class target at parity with compose
The values file is the single authoritative configuration contract

tasks.title: grounder Deployment + Service: same distroless image, mutation-off default, probes, auth-gated exposure

scenarios: The grounder Deployment runs the same distroless binary image
Mutation stays disabled by default under the Phase 0/1 foundation
The public Service is auth-gated and the admin listener is not default-exposed
The grounder Deployment declares liveness and readiness probes ordered after Postgres

tasks.title: Postgres, Temporal, LiteLLM templates + two-role DSN wiring + secret references

scenarios: Credentials are sourced from Kubernetes Secrets and never rendered as literals
The runtime DSN uses the DML-only role and migration uses the DDL role

tasks.title: CI helm-lint + template render + literal-credential scan gate

scenarios: CI runs helm lint and template render on a chart change
CI fails when a rendered manifest contains a literal credential
